title: ponera modesta
intro: Ponera modesta is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. It is a shrub native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Ponera modesta include its use as a purgative and diuretic, as well as its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Ponera modesta typically involve the leaves and roots being made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to promote its health benefits, including reduced inflammation and improved digestion.
